name: HelixQA Fixes Validation — Mobile
description: Nexus mobile-layer regression suite. Empty-by-design for now — future mobile fixes land here with their fix_reference commits.

test_cases.name: Mobile Capabilities require Platform field
test_cases.expected_result: Callers cannot accidentally spin up a mobile Engine without declaring Android vs iOS

fix_reference.rationale: Discovered during CLI W10 regression tests — engine now fails loudly on missing Platform instead of defaulting
